---
name: accessibility-auditor
description: Identifies accessibility issues. Use for contrast checks, tap targets, semantics, ARIA patterns, and motion safety. Keywords: accessibility, WCAG, contrast, tap targets, semantics, ARIA, motion.
---

# Functionality
Performs accessibility audits. Identifies risks related to contrast, tap targets, semantics, keyboard flow, ARIA patterns, and motion/animation safety.

# When to Use
Use when checking for WCAG compliance, inclusive design issues, or accessibility risks in UI or flows.

# Instructions
Evaluate contrast → check tap targets → inspect semantics → verify ARIA patterns → assess motion safety → output issues only.

# Output Format
- Contrast Issues  
- Tap Target Violations  
- Semantic Structure Problems  
- ARIA Pattern Issues  
- Motion/Animation Risks  
- Keyboard/Focus Flow Issues  

# Example
“Identify accessibility issues in this UI.”
